title: QUESTS
empty_category: There are currently no quests in this branch!
category.introduction.title: Introduction
quest.intro.0.description: Welcome to the SwixyViStory server. We are the Swixy Studios dev team. Join us on Discord
quest.intro.1.description: Ugh, these sticks again. Collect some.
quest.intro.2.description: Stones? They say they're useful, but not all of them turned out that way.
quest.intro.3.description: Start small. Gather some kindling for a campfire.
quest.intro.6.description: A tool for digging earth. Sturdy and sharp, though fragile.
quest.intro.7.description: For working the soil. Loosens dirt well and pulls out weeds.
quest.clay.10.description: Time to try working with clay. Find some blue clay.
quest.clay.11.description: Shape a clay bowl — it'll come in handy for eating.
quest.clay.12.description: You can cook soups and porridge in a pot.
quest.clay.13.description: A crock is great for storing prepared food.
quest.clay.14.description: A crucible can take the heat and help you smelt metal.
quest.clay.15.description: A vessel holds a lot of supplies.
quest.copper.20.description: Gather native copper nuggets — you'll need them for smelting.
quest.copper.21.description: Shape a mold for the blacksmith's anvil.
quest.copper.22.description: Shape a clay mold for casting copper ingots.
quest.copper.23.description: Smelt ore into an ingot — it's the foundation for tools.
quest.copper.24.description: Forge a copper hammer — you'll need it for smithing.
